title: Kisna - The Warrior Poet
desc: Kisna rescues an English girl from a violent mob and soon develops feelings for her, leaving him torn between his love for Laxmi, his fiancee, and the pressures of society.

title: Laadla
desc: Headstrong factory owner Sheetal marries Raju, the union leader, intending to crush his spirit and teach him a lesson, but their clash soon turns into a battle of wills.

title: Pippa
desc: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry fights bravely on the eastern front during the 1971 Indo-Pak war, proving his courage, strength, and dedication to the nation.

title: The Road
desc: A national highway dispute turns the lives of Meera, a journalist, and Maya, a professor, upside down, dragging them into a storm of conflict and chaos.

title: 102 Not Out
desc: Dattatraya, a lively 102-year-old, wants to break the world record for oldest person. He believes his son, Babulal, is too boring to help him achieve this goal.

title: Krazzy 4
desc: A doctor takes four intellectually disabled patients to a cricket match but gets kidnapped. The four team up with a TV channel girl to find and rescue her.

title: 3 A.M.
desc: Paranormal researchers explore a haunted location at the unholy hour of 3 A.M., uncovering chilling secrets and confronting forces beyond understanding in this spine-tingling horror.

title: Chaalbaaz
desc: Separated twins Anju and Manju grow up differently and accidentally swap lives. Shy Anju enters a rustic world, while bold Manju bravely takes revenge on their evil uncle.

title: Phool Bane Angaray
desc: Ranjit Singh uncovers strong evidence against a corrupt politician, putting himself at risk, while his wife courageously joins the police force to help him fight for justice.

title: Jism
desc: Kabir, an alcoholic lawyer, falls for Sonia, wife of a wealthy traveler. She lures him into murdering her husband, but her shocking motive leaves Kabir stunned.

title: Bhaiaji Superhit
desc: Lal Bhaisahab Dubey, a feared Varanasi gangster, decides to star in a film and hires a writer-director team, hoping that his newfound stardom will win back his estranged wife.

title: Lost
desc: After a plane crash, the survivors find themselves stranded on a mysterious island. As they struggle to stay alive, they must unite when they discover they are not alone.

title: Mili
desc: Mili Naudiyal works in a restaurant while preparing for Canada. Her life turns into a survival battle when she's accidentally locked inside a freezer.

title: Antim : The Final Truth
desc: A poor farmer's son rises in the city as a fearless gangster, but his reign is challenged when an unyielding cop steps in, sparking a fierce battle of power and justice.

title: Bhoot Returns
desc: Tarun and Namrata move into a luxurious bungalow with their children, Taman and Nimmi. But mysterious events soon threaten their lives, forcing them to escape for survival.

title: Kurukshetra
desc: ACP Prithviraj, an honest officer, arrests Chief Minister Baburao's son for rape. In retaliation, Baburao spares no effort to take vengeance against Prithviraj.
